# Orwell Removals & Storage

> Family-run removals and storage company based at Old Station Works, Main Road, Westerfield, Ipswich, Suffolk IP6 9AB (moving goods since 2005). Home, office, commercial, long-distance and piano removals, professional packing and secure container storage across Ipswich and the whole of Suffolk. Fully covered, Euro 6 fleet, free no-obligation surveys. Tel 01473 411531 / sales@orwellremovals.com.
